turns.assistant_text:
Here are some recent updates about Lionel Messi:

### Recent Articles and Videos
1. **Argentina's Lionel Messi Lands in Kansas City**: Messi has arrived in Kansas City to begin his quest for another World Cup title. He landed at Charles B. Wheeler Downtown Airport shortly before 9 p.m. on June 1, 2026. [Watch the video here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EJpnDFe07Nc) (Source: youtube.com).

2. **Messi Confirmed in Argentina's 6th World Cup Squad**: Despite ongoing injury concerns, Messi has been confirmed in Argentina's squad for his sixth World Cup appearance. [View the TikTok here](https://www.tiktok.com/@skysportsnews/video/7645252039458573590) (Source: tiktok.com).

3. **Messi's Chances of Anchoring Argentina's Title Defense**: A video discusses Messi's favorable chances of leading Argentina in their title defense at the 2026 World Cup, depending on his physical condition. [View the Instagram post here](https://www.instagram.com/reel/DY1pk--u-dH) (Source: instagram.com).

4. **World Cup 2026: Messi and Argentina Arrive in Kansas City**: Messi and his teammates have arrived in Kansas City as they prepare to defend their World Cup title. [Read more here](https://www.skysports.com/football/video/33727/13549931/lionel-messi-and-his-argentina-arrive-in-kansas-city-ahead-of-their-world-cup-title-defence) (Source: skysports.com).

5. **Lionel Messi World Cup 2010 Highlights**: A video showcasing Messi's skills, goals, and assists during the 2010 World Cup has gained attention. [Watch it here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fo4WwHSfnEU) (Source: youtube.com).

### Recent Tweets
There are currently no recent tweets from Lionel Messi's official account.

If you need more specific information or details, let me know!

items.title: Argentina's Lionel Messi lands in Kansas City to begin quest for another World Cup title
items.summary:
Argentina's Lionel Messi lands in Kansas City to begin quest for another World Cup title
KMBC 9
155000 subscribers
103 likes
4851 views
1 Jun 2026
The biggest star in the world's biggest sport has arrived in Kansas City.  Soccer legend Lionel Messi landed at Charles B. Wheeler Downtown Airport shortly before 9 p.m. Sunday.  Messi's arrival came hours after the rest of defending World Cup champion Argentina arrived at Kansas City International Airport.

KMBC 9 is your home for Missouri breaking news and weather. For your latest Missouri news and weather visit: https://www.kmbc.com/

For licensing inquiries: https://www.kmbc.com/licensing

items.title: World Cup 2026: Lionel Messi and Argentina arrive in Kansas City ahead of title defence - Sky Sports
items.summary: #### Premier League. #### Women's Super League. #### League One. #### Domestic Leagues. # World Cup 2026: Lionel Messi and Argentina arrive in Kansas City ahead of title defence. Lionel Messi arrives alongside his Argentina teammates in Kansas City as they begin their World Cup campaign to defend their title after lifting the trophy, four years ago in Qatar. Thomas Tuchel's England touches down in Florida ahead of their 2026 World Cup campaign and will travel to their Kansas base. England's plane touches down in US ahead of World Cup. The majority of the England squad have flown out to Miami ahead of their two World Cup warm-up matches. England fly out to Miami ahead of World Cup preparations. ### 'A complete midfield player' | Anderson's best PL moments for Forest. Sky Sports' Rob Dorsett speaks to former US international Matt Besler about the work of Mauricio Pochettino and the mood of the hosts ahead of the World Cup.
